name: nusantara/legacy
description: Nusantara Logistics legacy backend (originally vendored 2008, in-house since 2014). Do not bump packages without VP Eng sign-off.
//: DO NOT bump these versions casually.
vendor/ is committed — see ADR 0001 in ../docs/adrs/.
If composer install fails: do not panic. talk to VP Eng. some packages are no longer on packagist.
ext-oci8 is intentionally NOT in require — only one prod node has it, behind a feature flag.
